name: Retell AI MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Retell AI — a platform for building AI-powered voice agents and phone call automation. Enables AI agents to interact with Retell AI's API — creating voice agents, initiating calls, monitoring call status, retrieving transcriptions, and managing voice AI workflows for customer service, sales, and communication automation.
use_cases: Creating and configuring Retell AI voice agents from AI orchestration systems
Initiating outbound calls via Retell AI phone agents from automation workflows
Retrieving call transcriptions and analytics from reporting agents
Managing Retell AI voice agent configurations from DevOps agents
not_for: Teams not using Retell AI platform
Simple text-based chatbots without voice requirements
High-volume production calling without proper compliance review
best_when: A team building AI phone agents with Retell AI wants to integrate call initiation, agent management, and analytics into their MCP-based AI orchestration system.
avoid_when: You use other voice AI platforms (Vapi, Bland, Eleven Labs). Community tool — not official Retell AI integration. Voice AI carries compliance considerations (TCPA, GDPR).

auth.notes: Retell AI API key required. Generate in Retell AI dashboard.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Retell AI provides trial credits for new accounts
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-minute pricing for voice agent calls
pricing.notes: Retell AI API has per-minute call pricing. MCP server is free open source community tool.

performance.rate_limits: Retell AI API rate limits; concurrent call limits by plan

known_agent_gotchas: Voice calling has regulatory compliance requirements — TCPA consent for outbound calls is critical
Call initiation has real costs — test thoroughly with low volumes before automation
Community tool — not official Retell AI SDK, may lag behind Retell API changes
Call transcriptions contain sensitive voice data — handle per applicable privacy laws
agent_readiness.security_notes: API key auth. HTTPS to Retell AI. Voice calls involve real people — TCPA/GDPR compliance required. Call recordings and transcriptions are sensitive personal data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Voice call data is sensitive. TCPA/GDPR compliance required. API key auth. HTTPS. US data residency.
